title: 蹄鉄ならイクノにおまかせ！

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Check it out, you guys! I just got these new Super
Deluxe ☆ Turbo Rainbow cleats!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wowiee! They're so sparkly and shiny.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
You should add lights to yours too, Machitan.
Then you can jet off to victory at turbo speed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I-interesting! Maybe that way I won't be a normie
anymore!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Could we all just settle down? Come here for a
moment, you two...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Listen. Flashy accessories aren't going to make
you faster. If anything, they'll slow you down and
prevent you from running at your best.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Don't choose based on looks. Instead, choose the
cleats best suited to your legs and work your way
up from there.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
With appropriate, routine care, you can reduce
the risk of injury and—are you even listening to
me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I am... I knew this was too good to be true...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I just... I just wanna look cooool...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, you've upset them. What will you do
now?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's the teacher's responsibility to motivate
their students. So...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'll give one stamp for every day you take proper
care of your cleats.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
And if you collect enough stamps, you get some
colorful spider-shaped candy.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Colorful!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Spiders!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I see your angle here. You were never a teacher,
but a mother.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Well, if I'm the mother, you're their elder sister.
You'll give me a hand with them, right?

text_block_list.name: Turbo & Tannhauser
text_block_list.text: Let's get those candies, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't handle a family like this.
